meta.libraryPositioning: Visualization template library covering charts, infographics, diagrams, and strategic frameworks. The `charts/` path is retained for backward compatibility.

area_chart.label: Area Chart
area_chart.summary: Trend changes and cumulative volume (1-2 series, continuous time axis)

bar_chart.label: Bar Chart
bar_chart.summary: Category value comparison (3-8 categories, single series)

box_plot_chart.label: Box Plot
box_plot_chart.summary: Data distribution, median, dispersion and outlier analysis

bullet_chart.label: Bullet Chart
bullet_chart.summary: Target vs actual value comparison; compact multi-metric dashboard

butterfly_chart.label: Butterfly Chart
butterfly_chart.summary: Bidirectional mirror comparison of two datasets

donut_chart.label: Donut Chart
donut_chart.summary: Proportion and composition (3-6 parts, center KPI emphasis)

dual_axis_line_chart.label: Dual-Axis Line Chart
dual_axis_line_chart.summary: Dual Y-axis trend comparison with different units (2 metrics)

dumbbell_chart.label: Dumbbell Chart
dumbbell_chart.summary: Before-after or two-group value difference comparison

funnel_chart.label: Funnel Chart
funnel_chart.summary: Stage conversion and drop-off analysis (3-5 stages)

gantt_chart.label: Gantt Chart
gantt_chart.summary: Project scheduling with task spans and dependencies (6-12 tasks)

grouped_bar_chart.label: Grouped Bar Chart
grouped_bar_chart.summary: Multi-series grouped comparison (2-4 series across categories)

heatmap_chart.label: Heatmap
heatmap_chart.summary: Matrix intensity and pattern recognition (two-dimensional grid)

horizontal_bar_chart.label: Horizontal Bar Chart
horizontal_bar_chart.summary: Long-label ranking and category comparison (5-12 items)

kpi_cards.label: KPI Cards
kpi_cards.summary: Key numeric metrics overview (2×2 or 1×4 card layout)

line_chart.label: Line Chart
line_chart.summary: Time trend visualization (1-3 series, continuous axis)

matrix_2x2.label: 2x2 Matrix
matrix_2x2.summary: Dual-dimension positioning and priority quadrant analysis

org_chart.label: Organization Chart
org_chart.summary: Organizational hierarchy and reporting relationships (2-4 levels)

pareto_chart.label: Pareto Chart
pareto_chart.summary: 80/20 contribution analysis with cumulative bar-line combination

process_flow.label: Process Flow
process_flow.summary: Sequential process steps, connector arrows, and stage relationships (3-8 steps)

progress_bar_chart.label: Progress Bar Chart
progress_bar_chart.summary: Multi-item completion rate and progress comparison

sankey_chart.label: Sankey Diagram
sankey_chart.summary: Flow direction and resource allocation visualization (3-level)

scatter_chart.label: Scatter Plot
scatter_chart.summary: X/Y correlation, cluster and outlier analysis

stacked_area_chart.label: Stacked Area Chart
stacked_area_chart.summary: Multi-series stacked trend showing total and composition (2-4 series)

stacked_bar_chart.label: Stacked Bar Chart
stacked_bar_chart.summary: Composition and total side-by-side (2-4 composition parts per bar)

swot_analysis.label: SWOT Analysis
swot_analysis.summary: Strengths, weaknesses, opportunities and threats four-quadrant framework

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.summary: Milestones and historical evolution (3-8 key nodes)

treemap_chart.label: Treemap
treemap_chart.summary: Hierarchical area proportion display with grouping

waterfall_chart.label: Waterfall Chart
waterfall_chart.summary: Incremental change decomposition showing positive/negative contributions

pyramid_chart.label: Pyramid Chart
pyramid_chart.summary: Hierarchical structure and value layer progression (3-6 layers)

venn_diagram.label: Venn Diagram
venn_diagram.summary: Set relationships and intersection analysis (2-3 overlapping domains)

pros_cons_chart.label: Pros & Cons Chart
pros_cons_chart.summary: Bilateral advantage vs disadvantage comparison (2-5 items per side)

cycle_diagram.label: Cycle Diagram
cycle_diagram.summary: Circular repeating process and closed-loop flow (4-6 stages)

numbered_steps.label: Numbered Steps
numbered_steps.summary: Horizontal sequential step-by-step process flow (3-6 steps)

icon_grid.label: Icon Grid
icon_grid.summary: Feature cards in grid layout with icons (4-9 items)

isometric_stairs.label: Isometric Stairs
isometric_stairs.summary: 3D staircase progression and maturity visualization (4-7 stages)

snake_flow.label: Snake Flow
snake_flow.summary: S-shaped winding multi-step process (6-10 steps, journey/lifecycle)

roadmap_vertical.label: Vertical Roadmap
roadmap_vertical.summary: Vertical timeline with milestones and status tracking (4-8 nodes)

sector_diagram.label: Sector Diagram
sector_diagram.summary: Semi-circular radial layout around central topic (4-8 areas)

word_cloud.label: Word Cloud
word_cloud.summary: Keyword weight and frequency visualization (20-30 keywords)

concentric_circles.label: Concentric Circles
concentric_circles.summary: Layered priority rings from core to periphery (3-5 layers)

chevron_process.label: Chevron Process
chevron_process.summary: Arrow-chain linear phase progression with chunky stage arrows and deliverables (3-6 phases)

comparison_columns.label: Comparison Columns
comparison_columns.summary: Multi-column pricing or service tier comparison (2-4 tiers)

fishbone_diagram.label: Fishbone Diagram
fishbone_diagram.summary: Cause-and-effect root cause analysis / Ishikawa (4-6 branches)

hub_spoke.label: Hub & Spoke
hub_spoke.summary: Central hub connected to surrounding capability nodes (1 core + 4-8 spokes)

vertical_list.label: Vertical List
vertical_list.summary: Numbered vertical list with detail cards (3-6 key points/advantages)
